name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement for CopilotScan

labels: ["enhancement", "needs-triage"]
assignees: []
---

## Summary

<!-- One sentence describing the feature you are proposing. -->

## Problem / Motivation

<!-- What problem does this solve, and who benefits from it?
     Describe the gap in current CopilotScan behavior that this would address. -->

## Proposed Solution

<!-- How do you envision this feature working?
     Describe the expected CLI behavior, report output, new config keys,
     or API integration involved. -->

## Microsoft Graph API Reference (if applicable)

<!-- If this feature depends on a Graph API endpoint, please provide:
     - Endpoint URL and HTTP method
     - API version (v1.0 / beta)
     - Current availability status (GA / Beta / Preview / Not yet available)
     - Link to Microsoft Learn documentation -->

**Endpoint:** `GET https://graph.microsoft.com/...`
**Version:** beta / v1.0
**Status:** GA / Beta / Preview / Not yet available
**Docs:** https://learn.microsoft.com/...

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- Have you explored workarounds or alternative approaches?
     Why is the proposed solution the right one? -->

## Risk Engine Impact (if applicable)

<!-- If this feature introduces or modifies a risk rule, describe: -->

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Proposed rule ID | <!-- e.g. STALE_KNOWLEDGE_SOURCE --> |
| Trigger condition | <!-- When exactly does this rule fire? --> |
| Risk level | <!-- HIGH / MEDIUM / LOW / INFO --> |
| Data source | <!-- graph / purview / purview-inferred / unavailable --> |
| Rationale | <!-- Why does this matter for security or compliance? --> |

## Report Output Impact

<!-- How should this appear in the generated HTML report?
     New column, new risk badge, new section, chart change, etc.? -->

## Known Constraints or Limitations

<!-- Any known API limitations, license requirements, or GA rollout timing
     that would affect this feature? Reference known limitations from the
     technical reference if relevant. -->

## Additional Context

<!-- Links to related issues, Microsoft roadmap IDs, Message Center entries,
